message:
feat: Implement 12 core Python stdlib modules in Zig

Implement full functionality for high-priority Lib/ modules:
- functools: reduce, LruCache, partial, cmpToKey, TotalOrdering
- operator: comparison, arithmetic, bitwise, sequence operations
- copy: shallow copy, deepcopy with recursive handling
- heapq: heappush, heappop, heapify, nlargest, nsmallest, merge
- bisect: bisect_left/right, insort_left/right, find utilities
- struct: binary packing/unpacking with format strings
- string: string constants, Formatter, Template
- textwrap: wrap, fill, shorten, dedent, indent
- fnmatch: Unix filename pattern matching
- getopt: command-line option parsing
- subprocess: process creation and pipe communication
- tempfile: temporary file and directory creation
